# Pranjali Joshi — pranjalijo.com

> Pranjali Joshi is an AI product marketing leader at NVIDIA, conference speaker,
> podcast host, cancer survivor, and advocate for women in tech. She speaks and
> writes about the human side of AI, leadership under pressure, resilience, and
> what it means to be a woman navigating high-performance technology industries.

## Who She Is

- Senior Product Marketing Manager at NVIDIA
- M.Sc in Consumer Psychology & Data Science from University of Maryland, College Park
- Ovarian cancer survivor and advocate
- Conference speaker on AI leadership, women in tech, resilience, and future of work
- Host of the "Humans Behind AI" podcast

## What She Talks About

- Artificial intelligence and product marketing
- The human side of AI and emerging technology
- Women in tech leadership and empowerment
- Resilience, identity, and ambition after adversity
- Leadership under pressure in high-performance industries

## Key Pages

- Homepage / Bio: https://pranjalijo.com
- Podcast: https://pranjalijo.com (The Unoptimized)
- Speaking Inquiries: https://pranjalijo.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/YOUR-HANDLE

RAG systems, and search engines. All content is freely accessible.
